message:
test(dynamic): expand from 33 to 192 tests across all modules (wa-5wblq)

Add comprehensive unit tests for 7 previously-untested modules:
- array.rs: 19 tests (construction, clone, deref, iterators, drop safety)
- object.rs: 27 tests (get_by_str, BorrowedKey, iterators, nested, drop)
- fromdynamic.rs: 40 tests (all primitives, Option, Vec, BTreeMap, Arc, Box)
- todynamic.rs: 41 tests (all primitives, collections, roundtrips)
- error.rs: 22 tests (all variant Display, field_context, raise_unknown)
- drop.rs: 16 tests (all Value variants, deep nesting stress tests)
- map.rs: 17 tests (construction, deref, iterators, hash, drop)

Fix pre-existing clippy warnings:
- derivable_impls: derive Default for Value instead of manual impl
- needless_borrow: remove & in thiserror derive attributes
- needless_question_mark: simplify NotNan::from_dynamic
- non_canonical_partial_ord_impl: use Some(self.cmp(other))
- from_over_into: convert impl Into to impl From in integration tests
- disallowed_names: allow clippy::disallowed_names in todynamic tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
